member.name: P:Fantomas.CoreGlobalTool.Daemon.FantomasDaemon.WaitForClose
member.summary: returns a hot task that resolves when the stream has terminated

member.name: M:Program.readFromStdin(System.Int32)
member.summary:
Read input from stdin, with a given line limit until EOF occurs.
Returns **None** if no lines were read or the stdin was not redirected through a pipe

member.name: M:Program.processSourceFile(System.String,System.IO.TextWriter)
member.summary: Format inFile and write to text writer

member.name: M:Program.processSourceString(System.Boolean,System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpChoice{System.IO.TextWriter,System.String},Fantomas.FormatConfig.FormatConfig)
member.summary: Format a source string using given config and write to a text writer

member.name: M:Program.hasByteOrderMark(System.String)
member.summary: Fantomas assumes the input files are UTF-8 As is stated in F# language spec: https://fsharp.org/specs/language-spec/4.1/FSharpSpec-4.1-latest.pdf#page=25

member.name: M:Program.allFiles(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Get all appropriate files, either recursively or non-recursively
